ncc_chinh: RadioAd / Radio Vietnam / TVC24 (radiovietnam.com.vn, tvc24.com - cung he sinh thai)
meta.ghi_chu_thi_truong: Thi truong quang cao loa phuong/loa truyen thanh rat it NCC cong bo gia cong khai - da so bat lien he/tai PDF theo tung tinh (RadioVietnam va But Vang co bang gia PDF rieng cho ~60 tinh nhung khong render duoc qua fetch). Gia niem yet cong khai duy nhat dang bang la Brandcom: 100.000-450.000 d/ngay theo mien va thoi luong 30/60/90s (cap quan/huyen). Muc gia chung thi truong: 150.000-300.000 d/ngay, spot chuan 60 giay, phat 1-3 lan/ngay (thuong 2 lan sang-chieu). QUY TAC QUAN TRONG (nhieu NCC neu): gia phat tren 1 dai loa PHUONG/XA ~ 70% gia dai loa QUAN/HUYEN. Cach tinh thoi luong: file duoi 60s tinh nhu 60s, tren 60s nhan theo ty le. Phu phi: chua VAT (8-10%), mot so noi + 2% phi quan ly chien dich hoac thue phi 10-15%. Khung gio phat pho bien: sang 05:00-06:00, trua 11:00-12:00, chieu 17:00-18:00. Ha tang: ~720 dai truyen thanh quan/huyen va ~7.630 dai truyen thanh xa/phuong toan quoc; moi xa/phuong co 15-25 cum loa, moi quan/huyen 300-2.000 loa. Quy trinh: noi dung phai duoc dai DUYET TIN truoc khi phat; sau chien dich NCC cung cap Giay chung nhan phat song, hoa don VAT, file monitor, bien ban nghiem thu (RadioAd/Ravi Media). Gia thay doi theo dot va theo don vi hanh chinh moi (sap nhap 2025) - dinh gia theo quy mo dan so, dien tich, so cum loa, tan suat. 8 dong 'Dai VOV / Dai PT-TH tinh' trong rows la gia RADIO tham chieu lay tu bai viet loa phuong cua Brandcom, KHONG phai gia loa phuong - da danh dau ro trong ghi_chu tung dong.
